title: Sengoku Jidai Trinkets
description: Retextures "Trinkets" and "TrashSlot" to match "Sengoku Jidai's" inventory colors.
body:
A resourcepack that changes _"Trinkets"_ (by Emi) and _"TrashSlot"_ (by BlayTheNinth) to match the darker inventory ui colors of _"Sengoku Jidai"_ (by QwikSand).

Only works with the default Trinket slots currently; may add more in the future.
